# Jaypore Labs — AI-enabled software for real businesses

## About
Jaypore Labs is a friendly product studio. We build AI-enabled software and help businesses put AI to work — without rewriting what already runs. Since 2017. Industry-first, then AI-first. Based in India, remote-worldwide.

We don't sell AI as a category. We build the software around it — web, mobile, desktop, SaaS, internal tools — with AI embedded where it earns its keep.

## Founder
Yash Shah — Founder & Lead Engineer. 8+ years shipping software for global consumer brands, clinics in Europe, research teams, and ambitious founders.

## Capabilities
- Web applications — Next.js, React, type-safe
- Mobile apps — React Native, Expo
- Desktop applications — Electron, offline-first
- SaaS platforms — MVP to production, multi-tenant
- AI integration — scribes, copilots, agents, RAG, voice, MCP servers
- Internal tools — dashboards, admin, workflow automation
- Strategy + readiness — honest audits on whether AI is the right bet

## Engagement models
- Project — fixed-scope delivery (new AI-enabled product or retrofit)
- Retainer — monthly slice of the studio
- Augment — plug in beside your team as senior AI engineers

## Industries
Healthcare · Legal · Enterprise · Productivity · Fintech · Research · Consumer · Education

## Blog index
- /blog/ai-assistant-is-a-midwife — AI coding assistants × midwives (Claude Code / Cursor / Copilot)
- /blog/mcp-is-usb-c-for-ai — MCP × USB-C, why boring protocols win
- /blog/prompts-are-recipes — prompt engineering × recipes, not spells
- /blog/ai-agent-kitchen-brigade — AI agents × Escoffier's brigade
- /blog/medieval-scribes-ai-scribes — AI scribes × medieval scriptoria
